summary: Iteration 44 - All new features verified. Backend: 18/18 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All features working correctly. Verified: 1) ReviewPage uses CSS variables (no hardcoded colors), 2) QR code is black-on-white (#000000 on #ffffff), 3) Crew Assignments page with week grid, job pool, drag-drop, and Pre-load week forecast, 4) Coaching score-analysis endpoint returns crew scores with coaching_priority and weak_tasks, 5) System reference PDF endpoint returns valid PDF, 6) Settings page has workflow guides and PDF download, 7) 33 active rubrics across 7 divisions, 8) 25 standards in library.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 44 verified all new features: 1) ReviewPage theme compliance - all elements use CSS variables (var(--card), var(--foreground), var(--status-critical-bg), etc.) instead of hardcoded hex colors. 2) QR code on /dashboard uses bgColor='#ffffff' fgColor='#000000' for always-black-on-white scanning. 3) Crew Assignments page at /crew-assignments has week grid (Mon-Fri), job pool with search, Pre-load week forecast button, and modal for creating assignments. 4) GET /api/crew-assignments/week returns week data with dates array and week object. 5) POST /api/crew-assignments creates assignments, POST /api/crew-assignments/bulk handles multiple, DELETE removes. 6) GET /api/coaching/score-analysis returns crew scores with coaching_priority (low/medium/high) and weak_tasks array. 7) GET /api/exports/system-reference-pdf returns valid PDF (accepts token query param). 8) Settings page has WorkflowGuides component (6 expandable cards) and System Reference PDF download button. 9) 33 active rubrics across 7 divisions (Maintenance, Install, Tree, Enhancement, Irrigation, Snow/Ice, PHC). 10) 25 standards in library (paginated, 12 per page).

verified_features.review_page_theme_compliance: All elements use CSS variables - no hardcoded #fff6f1, #f2c9bc, #243e36, #edf0e7, #f6f6f2, or bg-white
verified_features.qr_code_black_on_white: QRCodeSVG uses bgColor='#ffffff' fgColor='#000000' - always scannable
verified_features.crew_assignments_page: Week grid with Mon-Fri columns, job pool with search, Pre-load week forecast button, assignment modal with crew/job/priority/notes
verified_features.crew_assignments_api: GET /week returns dates array and week object, POST creates, POST /bulk handles multiple, DELETE removes
verified_features.coaching_score_analysis: Returns crew scores with coaching_priority (low/medium/high) and weak_tasks array based on rapid reviews
verified_features.system_reference_pdf: Returns valid PDF with architecture, storage, schema, and implementation details
verified_features.settings_page: Workflow guides (6 expandable cards), System Reference PDF download, Account Security, Staff Management
